series_metadata.series_description: A packet of documents used to monitor the collateral sufficiency of delivery versus payment (DVP) and tri-party repurchase agreements. A report is generated in the investment inventory software for DVP repurchase agreements. A spreadsheet is created for tri-party repurchase agreements using the trade ticket information and the daily market value of collateral provided by the custodian. Such reports are stored in IT's Data Warehouse/SQL database.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
